details: layernorm+rmsnorm ops nuked in commit abe4526b0a; interleaved RMSNorm shared layernorm device op. Recovering reference kernels from pre-nuke commit ab57850947: layernorm.cpp (resident-row compute), layernorm_large_tensor.cpp (streaming), layernorm_op_multi_core.cpp (program factory).

Interleaved RMSNorm=layernorm.cpp compute holds full Wt row resident (cb_xmm/cb_in sized Wt_next_block_up). Non-aligned W handled by partial scaler (2nd scaler tile zeroing cols>=W%32), no separate mask in non-welford path. RM input via TILIZE_IN tilize in compute + cb_in_rm; rsqrt via mul_tiles_bcast_cols; gamma via mul_tiles_bcast_rows on cb_gamma(c_5).
Searching sharded L1 buffer model, ROW_MAJOR shard storage, self-NoC read idiom, my_x/my_y, and reader/writer kernels reading own resident sharded L1

Confirmed: sharded L1 buffer one address across banks (bank_manager.cpp:448, buffer.hpp:236); CB globally-allocated to buffer.address() (circular_buffer_config.cpp:224); RM shard = Hs sticks stride Ws*elem (transpose reader, pad stickwise reader); self-NoC read via my_x[noc]/my_y[noc] (dataflow_api_addrgen.h:281, risc_common.h:40-43); examples reader_unary_transpose_wh_sharded_rm.cpp + reader_pad_dims_rm_sharded_stickwise.cpp

Confirmed 32x32 tile face layout (4x 16x16 faces, row-major within face) via tilize_utils.cpp nfaces mapping; bf16 offset row0 col c = c<16?c*2:(256+(c-16))*2, fp32 *4. bfp8_b = 64B exp section (1 exp byte per face-row, shared by 16 elts) + 1024B mantissa (1 byte/elt), tile=1088B; per-element extraction needs exp+mantissa decode, not a byte copy. No kernel_lib helper reads row0 of a TILE-layout tensor.
